chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 997 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on MA No.6915/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.6916/2025 (R/Surety) 03.12.2025 Mr. Deedar Ali M. Chohan, Advocate for applicant / surety..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. This application is filed by the applicant seeking return of surety document. As per contentions of learned Counsel, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it seems that accused Sona Khan alias Sono Khan Kalhoro, who on 13.10.2025, was granted protective bail for a period of five days, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/-, for which applicant stood surety by depositing an original special savings certificate of such amount, had surrendered before the trial Court and has obtained bail, as is evident from orders dated 14.10.2025 and 15.10.2025 of the trial Court, annexed with this application. Mr. Mansoor Ahmed Shaikh, learned Deputy Prosecutor General, present in Court in connection with other matters, waives notice and does not oppose this application. Accordingly, the application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety document to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
